channel.title: Rights Dispatch — SherpaCarta
channel.description: Monthly briefing on digital rights, SherpaCarta charter updates, and privacy victories worldwide. A Give A Bit production.
channel.itunes:author: SherpaCarta / Give A Bit

item.title: Welcome to SherpaCarta — Why a Digital Magna Carta?
item.description: Introduction to the 114-article charter, the Canada/BC Challenge, and how to sign. Audio episodes coming soon — subscribe for updates.

item.title: Article 11 — The Right to Privacy
item.description: Deep dive into SherpaCarta Article 11 — the cornerstone privacy article. Read at sherpacarta.org/?article=11

item.title: Canada & BC Challenge — Change Law First
item.description: Why British Columbia is the first jurisdiction beachhead for digital rights legislation modeled on SherpaCarta.
